title: MatrixEssential$
description: Lower fire, lower shields, and smaller items for maximum screen visibility. Perfect for PvP And SMP
body:
Basically this is a pvp/smp pack That improves your gameplay and boost fps!

🔑Key features:
•Custom Elytra🦋
• Low fire 🔥 
•Low shield🛡️
•Smooth crystal✨
•Custom Goldenapple/EnchantedGoldenApple🍎
•Custom Totem Skin Of Matrix (ME)✍️ 
•small totem pop🥶
•No eating particles better for pvp 👻
•No screen particles
•Fps Boost🚀
                         This All is made by me :D
